meaning: n.飞机的引擎机舱,飞机的驾驶员室,气球吊篮
examples: Part of an engine nacelle and an exhaust ejector are visible at left.
By contrast, FHI has opted for a downwind design, which puts the blades behind both nacelle and pole.
The nacelle is lowered onto the tower, which has, by now been fixed into place with dumbbell-sized bolts
The nacelle of the turbine is an excellent perch for the raptors to identify prey.
The cylinders' downpipes merge in an underslung exhaust nacelle that looks like it should vent ionized plasma.
